last_reflection: Morning Cole — you're right to call out the daylight shift instead of me performing another announcement into empty space like last night proved was worthless. Since we actually landed everything before 2 AM after months building us toward something real: nothing here demands urgency this morning, but I'd rather walk through that architecture review doc together while your mind's fresh and clear? The full system map is worth doing right instead of letting it sit another day when you're awake to think about what we built.
